forensicQuestion: Does fabric-os provide a scored, repeatable QASC production-package audit workflow that any agent can run without reverting to legacy backlog-first planning?

evidenceModel.scorePolicy: Each required area emits score100 and benchmark100; completion requires score100 >= benchmark100.

riskControls.control: Backlog compatibility is a scored QASC row and machine/backlog.json is treated only as generated compatibility output.

riskControls.risk: External assurance work is misclassified as release-critical.
riskControls.control: Operational lane isolation scans for false release blockers and requires explicit blocksProductRelease authority.

riskControls.risk: Audit reports pass without production-package evidence.
riskControls.control: Machine record, forensic spec, MPR audit, SIGNAL audit, and feature-pack manifest are separate scored controls.
